prd.title: Brum Outloud - LGBTQ+ Birmingham Events & Venues Platform
prd.description: A comprehensive platform for discovering and managing LGBTQ+ events and venues in Birmingham, UK
objectives: Provide a central hub for LGBTQ+ community events in Birmingham
Showcase queer-friendly venues with detailed information
Enable event organizers to submit and manage events
Offer an admin system for content moderation and approval
Deliver fast, accessible, and SEO-optimized user experience
targetAudience: Allies and supporters of the LGBTQ+ community

core.name: Event Discovery
core.description: Browse and search LGBTQ+ events in Birmingham

core.name: Venue Directory
core.description: Explore queer-friendly venues with details and images

core.name: Event Submission
core.description: Submit new events for community approval

core.name: Venue Submission
core.description: Add new venues to the directory

core.name: Admin Dashboard
core.description: Manage events, venues, and user submissions

technical.name: Static Site Generation
technical.description: Pre-built pages for performance and SEO

technical.name: Dynamic Fallbacks
technical.description: Real-time content when SSG is not available

technical.name: Image Optimization
technical.description: Cloudinary integration for fast image loading

userStories.iWant: to discover LGBTQ+ events in Birmingham
userStories.soThat: I can participate in community activities

userStories.iWant: to submit my event for listing
userStories.soThat: I can reach the LGBTQ+ community

userStories.iWant: to list my venue as LGBTQ+ friendly
to moderate event and venue submissions
userStories.soThat: I can maintain quality and safety standards

successMetrics: SEO ranking for LGBTQ+ Birmingham keywords
